creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-06-03 13:19:58 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net-im               Makefile 
  Added files:
    net-im/trix          Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    net-im/trix/files    patch-crypto.cpp patch-settings.cpp 
                         patch-xxxprotocol.cpp patch-xxxprotocol.h 
  Log:
  As compared to VyQChat in TriX such new features appears as:
  files transfer, bulletin board, users avatars, logs, links
  navigation, broadcast and multicast type of connection, search
  by IP address and many other, a few more features not listed here.
  Now TriX is compatible with the version 2.0 of the Vypress Chat
  protocol developed by VyPRESS Research.
  
  WWW: http://trix.sourceforge.net/
  
  PR:             ports/123037
  Submitted by:   Kozienko Aleksandr <pascalamsg at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.88      +1 -0      ports/net-im/Makefile
  1.1       +37 -0     ports/net-im/trix/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/net-im/trix/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +8 -0      ports/net-im/trix/files/patch-crypto.cpp (new)
  1.1       +29 -0     ports/net-im/trix/files/patch-settings.cpp (new)
  1.1       +37 -0     ports/net-im/trix/files/patch-xxxprotocol.cpp (new)
  1.1       +20 -0     ports/net-im/trix/files/patch-xxxprotocol.h (new)

  1.1       +120 -0    ports/net-im/trix/pkg-plist (new)
